description: Table lvlwarp du mod TCP (colonnes documentees via le D2R Data Guide).
source: Colonnes du .txt (mod TCP) ; types/descriptions du D2R Data Guide (guide/).

columns.name: Name
columns.description: This is a reference field to define the Level Warp

columns.name: Id
columns.description: Defines the numeric ID for the type of Level Warp. This ID can be shared between multiple Level Warps if those Level Warps want to use the same functionality. This is referenced in other files

columns.name: LitVersion
columns.description: If equals 1, then Level Warp tiles will change their appearance when highlighted. If equals 0, then the Level Warp tiles will not change appearance when highlighted

columns.name: Tiles
columns.description: Defines an index offset to determine which tile to use in the tile set for the highlighted version of the Level Warp. These tiles are loaded and hidden/revealed when the player mouse hovers over the Level Warp tiles. This relies on

columns.name: NoInteract
columns.description: If equals 1, then the Level War cannot be directly interacted by the player. If equals 0, then the player can interact with the Level Warp

columns.name: Direction
columns.description: Defines the orientation of the Level Warp. Uses a specific string code.

columns.name: UniqueId
columns.description: Defines the unique numeric ID for the Level Warp. Each Level Warp should have a unique ID so that the game can handle loading that specific Level Warp's related files.
